description_long: This is a modern white hatchback convertible car with a sleek, aerodynamic design and a compact body. The front features a prominent grille with a recognizable lion emblem, flanked by angular headlights and a sculpted hood. The side profile reveals two doors, stylish alloy wheels, and a smooth, uninterrupted beltline, while the open roof exposes a two-row seating arrangement. The rear view shows a wide stance, integrated taillights, and a subtle rear bumper, with the hatchback trunk area clearly visible. The car's surfaces are glossy and smooth, reflecting light and emphasizing its contemporary styling. The interior appears to be upholstered, with visible seats and dashboard details.
description: A sleek white convertible hatchback car with a glossy finish, two doors, and a modern, compact design. Features include a lion-emblem grille, alloy wheels, and an open roof revealing two rows of seats.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lion-emblem grille, angular headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open roof, two doors, alloy wheels, and visible interior seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide stance, integrated taillights, and hatchback trunk area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open roof, two doors, and alloy wheels.
